test.create_query: CREATE TABLE test_u64_left_{card} (k UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY k
CREATE TABLE test_u64_right_{card} (k UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY k
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO test_u64_left_{card} SELECT number % {card} FROM numbers_mt(5000000)
INSERT INTO test_u64_right_{card} SELECT number FROM numbers({card})
test.query: SELECT count() FROM test_u64_left_{card} AS a JOIN test_u64_right_{card} AS b ON a.k = b.k FORMAT Null SETTINGS join_algorithm = 'partial_merge'
